workLog.action: Selected issue #1693 from candidates (P1, bug+documentation+enhancement, labels agent-orchestrator/implementer/critic/qa/security/memory, area-prompts). Confirmed no existing PR.
workLog.outcome: Acceptance criteria: add Principle #6 guardrail to orchestrator, implementer, critic, qa, security prompts with internal/external/ambiguous examples. Evidence cited: OpenClaw autoresearch exp-026 (composite 0.957 → 0.997; 11/11 benchmarks pass).

workLog.action: Inspected agent file structures in src/claude/, templates/agents/, and .claude/agents/. Verified ADR-036 two-source architecture: src/claude/*.md hand-maintained; templates/agents/*.shared.md generates Copilot/VS Code outputs; .claude/agents/*.md is runtime-installed copy (do not edit).
workLog.outcome: Edit boundary confirmed. Must update src/claude/ + templates/agents/ for universal content (ADR-036 Rule 1: Bidirectional Synchronization).

workLog.action: Added '## Operating Principles' section with Principle #6 (act-boldly-on-internal/confirm-on-external, with internal/external/ambiguous-scope bullets) to src/claude/{orchestrator,implementer,critic,qa,security,memory}.md. Tailored each agent's examples to its domain (orchestrator: delegations; implementer: push/migrations; critic: verdicts; qa: shared environments; security: public disclosure; memory: delete/purge).
Mirrored the same section into templates/agents/{orchestrator,implementer,critic,qa,security,memory}.shared.md per ADR-036 sync requirement.
Ran python3 build/generate_agents.py to regenerate src/copilot-cli/ and src/vs-code-agents/ from updated templates.
workLog.outcome: 69 files generated; Principle #6 propagated to Copilot CLI and VS Code outputs for the 6 agents.
1 pre-existing drift (merge-resolver, not in scope). 6 touched agents all report OK. No new drift introduced.
